PARTIES RETURNED FROM MEET & CONFER WITHOUT AN AGREEMENT. AFTER ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION, THE COURT RULED THAT COUNSEL SHALL CONFER (THROUGH TELEPHONE CONFERENCE) WITH PREVIOUSLY ORDERED MEDICAL EXPERT AS PRESCRIBED BY THE EVIDENCE CODE.
